description: These ethnic look slip-ons from catwalk are perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be worn with everything: from casual jeans and tees to skirts and dresses, though they gel perfectly with ethnic wear.UpperThong straps on the forefoot made of woven braids in different colours held together in the centre with a beaded metal pendantSynthetic leather toe separator for added comfortFootbed in ergonomic design with embossed Egyptian pattern for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
